examples: The armed forces were on high alert to guard against any retaliation.
Community and church leaders have appealed for calm and no retaliation.
Police said they believed the attack was in retaliation for the death of the drug trafficker.
The WTO has previously allowed such retaliation, although nobody has ever followed through with such steps.
John DeStefano, New Haven's mayor, suspects the raids were in retaliation for the card.
